jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at 5paisa - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa:
5paisa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
